event: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi

items.fight_news: Kape's southpaw stance and explosive check right hook will be his primary weapon against Horiguchi's darting karate movement. Horiguchi must utilize calf kicks to limit Kape's mobility early in the fight.
Horiguchi's tendency to close distance in straight lines could expose him to Kape's counter uppercuts. The critical metric is whether Kape can cut off the cage and trap Horiguchi against the fence.
Cutelaba relies heavily on chaotic early pressure, but Stirling's kickboxing fundamentals and lateral movement are designed to neutralize blitzes.
If Cutelaba cannot secure a takedown in the first round, his cardio historically drops significantly, heavily favoring Stirling's measured output.
Fili steps in on short notice to replace Giga Chikadze, which makes his pacing a massive variable. Oliveira's powerful leg kicks could immediately compromise Fili's movement.
Fili must rely on his wrestling and top control to neutralize Oliveira's explosive striking and drain his energy.
Rodriguez excels at slipping strikes and countering in the pocket. Amil needs to utilize his jab and stay on the outside to avoid brawling with the sharper counter puncher.
Rodriguez's submission defense will be tested if Amil decides to chain wrestle against the cage.
Lima's Muay Thai clinch is devastating, but Borjas has the speed advantage on the outside. Borjas must angle off instead of backing up straight when Lima enters.
Baghdasaryan is a lethal kickboxer but struggles against high level chain wrestling. Magomedov's entire path to victory relies on securing early body locks.
Mesquita's world class grappling makes her a threat from any position on the ground. Mullins must prioritize defensive posture and strike from range to avoid tangling up.
Nascimento uses long teeps to manage distance. Raposo must time these kicks and counter over the top to close the gap successfully.

bouts.title: Gaston Bolanos vs. Michael Aswell Jr.

items.fight_news: Bolanos throws spinning attacks that require space. Aswell Jr. needs to crowd Bolanos and fight from the inside to stifle his creativity.
Rosa's grinding cage control is her best asset, while Santos looks for judo throws. The clinch battle will dictate the entire rhythm of the fight.
Shahbazyan has secured four consecutive first round finishes entering this debut. Chokheli must weather the early storm and extend the fight past the first frame where Shahbazyan's output might wane.
Collins arrives undefeated with strong finishing ability. Tanzilovi needs to employ defensive wrestling and lateral footwork to frustrate the aggressive newcomer.
